title: Milk and infant formula - Canada.ca
content:
## Milk and infant formula
Protect children from food poisoning by knowing the facts about powdered infant formula and raw (unpasteurized) milk.

## Services and information

### Preparing and handling powdered infant formula
Get tips for preparing and handling powered infant formula. Also find formula alternatives for babies who are premature, low-birth weight or have weakened immune systems.

### Raw or unpasteurized milk
Find out how raw (unpasteurized) milk can cause food poisoning, especially in populations most vulnerable to sickness.
